rule_metadata.author: Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Commands to Clear or Remove the Syslog - Builtin

rules.rule_text:
title: Commands to Clear or Remove the Syslog - Builtin
id: e09eb557-96d2-4de9-ba2d-30f712a5afd3
status: test
description: Detects specific commands commonly used to remove or empty the syslog
references:
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/fc614fb4bda24ae8ca2c44e812d12c0fab6dd7a097472a35dd12ded053ab8474
author: Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems)
date: 2021-09-10
modified: 2022-11-26
tags:
- attack.impact
- attack.t1565.001
logsource:
  product: linux
detection:
  selection:
  - rm /var/log/syslog
  - rm -r /var/log/syslog
  - rm -f /var/log/syslog
  - rm -rf /var/log/syslog
  - mv /var/log/syslog
  - ' >/var/log/syslog'
  - ' > /var/log/syslog'
  falsepositives:
  - /syslog.
  condition: selection and not falsepositives
falsepositives:
- Log rotation
level: high
